$comment: Sample AI-news payload. The pipeline writes news-latest.json in this exact shape. See NEWSLETTER-SETUP.md §News for the contract. 'stories' should be ordered most-important-first; the digest takes the top 3 (daily) or top 5 (weekly).

stories.title: EU AI Act enforcement phase begins for general-purpose models
stories.summary: The first binding obligations for general-purpose AI providers take effect, with documentation and transparency requirements leaders should note for procurement.

stories.title: Major cloud provider ships agentic workflow tooling for enterprises
stories.summary: New tooling lets teams chain models into multi-step workflows — promising for adoption, but it raises the governance questions covered in this week's Insight.

stories.title: Study: most enterprise AI pilots still fail to reach production
stories.summary: A large survey finds the gap between successful pilots and scaled adoption remains wide, echoing the structural-shift theme.

stories.title: New open-weight model narrows the gap with frontier systems
stories.summary: Cheaper, self-hostable options expand what smaller teams can do without sending data to third parties.

stories.title: Regulators publish guidance on AI use in professional services
stories.summary: Confidentiality and verification expectations are spelled out for legal, finance and advisory firms.
